summary: Frontend testing complete for bug fixes: 1) Stop sign icon now uses pure SVG with embedded text (no text-behind-icon bug), 2) 3D follow mode correctly zooms to user location at pitch 70° with zoom 17.5. All features verified working: Guest login, 2D map with Mapbox tiles, 3D satellite view, follow mode, overview mode toggle, bottom HUD with Distance/Time/ETA.

minor.issue: 504 Gateway Timeout when fetching traffic infrastructure - cosmetic only, does not affect core functionality

minor_issues.issue: Chart dimension warning 'width(-1) height(-1)' still occurs occasionally
minor_issues.note: Known issue from previous iterations - does not affect functionality

minor_issues.issue: Intermittent 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading get)' error when rapidly clicking zoom buttons - app recovers on page refresh
minor_issues.note: Occurred once during testing, may be related to mapbox map reference timing

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: TrafficIcon.tsx lines 27-32 - Stop sign uses pure SVG with <polygon> + <text> elements (no lucide-react overlay)
VERIFIED: TrafficIcon.tsx lines 35-40 - Yield sign uses pure SVG with <polygon> + <text> elements
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx lines 265-271 - Follow button flyTo includes pitch:70, zoom:17.5, duration:1000
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx lines 275-276 - Follow button sets isFollowMode(true) and isOverviewMode(false)
VERIFIED: Navigation3DView.tsx lines 316-319 - Truck marker always updates position, camera only moves when isFollowMode && !isOverviewMode
VERIFIED: Navigation3DView.tsx lines 325-331 - Camera easeTo includes pitch:70 when following
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx lines 234-240 - Overview mode toggles pitch between 0 (overview) and 70 (follow)
VERIFIED: 2D map uses Mapbox dark-v11 raster tiles (console log confirms)

features_tested.yield_sign_icon: PASS - TrafficIcon uses pure SVG with embedded text (code verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://nav-gps-route.preview.emergentagent.com. Bug fixes verified: 1) Stop sign and yield sign icons in TrafficIcon.tsx now use pure SVG with embedded <text> elements instead of lucide-react overlays - this fixes the 'text behind icon' bug. 2) 3D follow mode in MapControls.tsx now includes pitch:70 in the flyTo call, and Navigation3DView.tsx only updates camera when isFollowMode=true && !isOverviewMode. The truck marker always moves regardless of follow mode. Key test flow: Guest login -> Navigation -> search 'Chicago' -> Route -> click '2D' to enter 3D -> pan away from truck -> click follow button (Target icon) -> should zoom to truck at 70° pitch.
